header.description: Ki-61 rolls into a sustained, LEVEL 45-deg coordinated turn and holds it. B2: a level turn now requires commanding g = 1/cos(45 deg) ~= 1.414 (the lift that both turns and holds altitude); gamma stays ~0 so altitude is held by physics, not teleported. Exercises roll-rate slew toward phi_max(TAS), the load-factor->induced-drag bleed, and the coordinated-turn great-circle. TAS 140 m/s sits in the ki61 LUT domain where phi_max=45 deg.
